mapper.insert: insert into market_tbl values( #{marketNo}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, sysdate, 1, #{marketWriter}, 0, #{sellAddr}, #{sellPrice}, 0, null )
mapper.select:
SELECT m.market_no, m.market_title, m.market_content, m.market_date, m.market_status, m.market_writer, m.view_count, m.sell_addr, m.sell_price, m.completed, m.completed_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_like_tbl WHERE market_no = m.market_no) AS like_count
,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_like_tbl WHERE market_no = m.market_no AND member_id = #{memberId}) AS is_like
,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_report_tbl WHERE market_no = m.market_no) AS report_count
,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_report_tbl WHERE market_no = m.market_no AND member_id = #{memberId}) AS is_report
FROM market_tbl m WHERE m.market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.update: update market_tbl set view_count = view_count+1 where market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.select: select count(*) from market_like_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}

select m.market_no, m.market_title, to_char(m.market_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') market_date, m.market_writer, m.view_count, m.sell_addr, m.sell_price, ( select market_file_path from ( select mf.market_file_path from market_file_tbl mf where mf.market_no = m.market_no order by mf.market_file_no asc ) where rownum = 1 ) marketThumb from market_tbl m where m.market_status = 1
order by m.market_no desc
order by m.view_count desc
offset 0 rows fetch next 5 rows only

select count(*) from market_comment_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo} and market_recomment_no is null
and is_secret = 1
and is_secret = 0
mapper.insert: insert into market_comment_tbl values ( market_comment_seq.NEXTVAL, #{marketCommentContent}, sysdate, #{marketNo}, #{marketCommentWriter}, #{marketRecommentNo}, #{isSecret}, 0 )
mapper.update: update market_comment_tbl set market_comment_content = #{marketCommentContent}, is_secret = #{isSecret}, is_edited = 1 where market_comment_no = #{marketCommentNo}
mapper.select: select market_file_path from market_file_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}
